# llms.txt — ems-3dp.com (Precise3D)
> Precise3D: Export-grade consumer 3D printers for global B2B distribution, OEM white-label, and education markets.

## Products
- [Product Catalog](https://ems-3dp.com/products/): Pro X1, Creator C1, Start S1 — three tiers with full specs and comparison table

## Partner Programs
- [Partner Programs Overview](https://ems-3dp.com/solutions/): Distribution, OEM white-label, and education partnerships
- [Distribution Partnership](https://ems-3dp.com/solutions/distribution/): Territory rights, tiered pricing, marketing support
- [OEM & White Label](https://ems-3dp.com/solutions/oem-white-label/): Custom branding, firmware, MOQ options
- [Education & Institutional](https://ems-3dp.com/solutions/education/): Classroom bundles, curriculum, safety features

## Engineering & Credibility
- [Engineering Hub](https://ems-3dp.com/engineering/): R&D, quality control, and certifications overview
- [Research & Development](https://ems-3dp.com/engineering/research-development/): 7-stage gate process, firmware, testing
- [Quality Control](https://ems-3dp.com/engineering/quality-control/): 7 inspection gates, metrology, ISO 9001
- [Certifications](https://ems-3dp.com/engineering/certifications/): CE, FCC, RoHS, KC, BIS, UKCA, SAA

## Technology Deep-Dives
- [Technology Hub](https://ems-3dp.com/technology/): Technical foundations overview
- [CoreXY Kinematics](https://ems-3dp.com/technology/corexy-kinematics/): Architecture, comparison with bedslinger/delta, technical advantages
- [Material Science](https://ems-3dp.com/technology/material-science/): 6 polymer families, application matrix, filament guide

## Partner Resources
- [Partner Support Hub](https://ems-3dp.com/partner-support/): Training, marketing assets, after-sales support
- [Training Program](https://ems-3dp.com/partner-support/training/): 4 learning tracks for sales and technical teams
- [Marketing Assets](https://ems-3dp.com/partner-support/marketing-assets/): 6 asset categories for co-branded promotion
- [After-Sales Support](https://ems-3dp.com/partner-support/after-sales/): Warranty, RMA process, spare parts

## Partner Stories
- [Partner Stories](https://ems-3dp.com/partner-stories/): Real distributor case studies
- [EMEA Distributor Success](https://ems-3dp.com/partner-stories/emea-distributor-success/): Timeline, results, partner quote

## Market Insights
- [Market Overview](https://ems-3dp.com/market-insights/): Global 3D printer market data by region
- [Regional Guides](https://ems-3dp.com/market-insights/regional-guides/): 6 region deep-dives for market entry

## Customer Resources
- [How It Works](https://ems-3dp.com/how-it-works/): 7-step partner journey from inquiry to delivery
- [FAQ](https://ems-3dp.com/faq/): 12 FAQs covering products, MOQ, shipping, support, certification
- [Request Quote](https://ems-3dp.com/quote/): Inquiry form with country, volume, and program selection
- [Blog](https://ems-3dp.com/blog/): 50+ articles on 3D printing technology, distribution strategy, and industry insights

## Company
- [About Us](https://ems-3dp.com/about/)
- [Contact](https://ems-3dp.com/contact/): Inquiry form, email, Shenzhen headquarters

## Legal
- [Privacy Policy](https://ems-3dp.com/privacy/)
- [Terms of Service](https://ems-3dp.com/terms/)

## Key Facts
- Products: Consumer/prosumer 3D printers (FDM)
- Product Line: Pro X1 (professional), Creator C1 (mid-range), Start S1 (entry)
- Business Models: B2B distribution, OEM white-label, education/institutional
- Engineering: In-house R&D, 7-stage QC, CoreXY kinematics
- Certifications: ISO 9001, CE, FCC, RoHS, KC, BIS, UKCA, SAA
- Location: Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
- MOQ: Flexible — as low as 50 units for distribution, 100 for white-label
- Global Markets: EMEA, Americas, APAC, Oceania
